    Technical source data

    MissionTypes:UdHdtah4DUid6sZ6MWw_dQ

    label(PvP-1) Time to pick sides (3-0)
    title(PvP-1) Time to pick sides
    addedEnemies[]
    descriptionIt's time for you to choose what you want this universe to be like. You can either strive to uphold some order in the universe ... or kill, murder, prey on the weak, and take what should've been yours anyway. You can either go hostile and kill any player in your way, or defend the order and kill any hostile troublemakers you can find. Reach either 15 Pirate-Reputation or 15 Police-Reputation.
